title: Reusable link component with variant styling and external icon
purpose: Provides a customizable link component that supports different visual variants, external link indicators, and disabled states.
module_context: Exports a Link component with predefined variant classes and a display name for React debugging.

steps.content: Accept props including href, label, onClick, variant, disabled, external, and className.
Define a click handler that prevents default behavior when disabled or when onClick is provided.
Render an anchor element with appropriate href, target, and rel attributes based on external flag.
Apply variant-specific styling classes and additional className prop.
Include an external link icon when the external prop is true.
IF the link is disabled, prevent the default click behavior and return early.
ELSE IF an onClick handler is provided, prevent the default behavior and call the onClick handler.
